---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
install.packages("cbsodataR")
install.packages("sf")
install.packages("CCA")
install.packages("factoextra")
install.packages("cbsodataR")
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(rmarkdown)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggfortify)
library(sf)
library(patchwork)
library(CCA)
library(factoextra)
library(cbsodataR)
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).

```{r}

files <- sort(list.files(path = "DATA", pattern = "uitslag.csv", full.names = TRUE))

legi <- lapply(files, read_csv2)

names(legi) <- c(2021,2023,2025)

```

```{r}

legi[["2025"]]

```

```{r}

legi[3] <- lapply(legi[3], function(x) x %>% filter(str_detect(RegioCode, "G")))
legi[3] <- lapply(legi[3], function(x) x %>% filter(str_detect(VeldType, "LijstAantalStemmen")))

legi[2] <- lapply(legi[2], function(x) x %>% filter(str_detect(RegioCode, "G")))
legi[2] <- lapply(legi[2], function(x) x %>% filter(str_detect(VeldType, "LijstAantalStemmen")))

```

```{r}
fix_nuenen <- function(x) {
  x <- x |> mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
  
  nuenen_rows <- x[[1]] == "Nuenen"
  x[nuenen_rows, 2:(ncol(x) - 1)] <- x[nuenen_rows, 3:ncol(x)]
  x[nuenen_rows, ncol(x)] <- NA
  
  x |> type.convert(as.is = TRUE)
}

legi[3] <- lapply(legi[3], fix_nuenen)
legi[3][[1]] <- legi[3][[1]] |> select(where(~!all(is.na(.) | . == "")))

legi[2] <- lapply(legi[2], fix_nuenen)
legi[2][[1]] <- legi[2][[1]] |> select(where(~!all(is.na(.) | . == "")))

```

\

```{r}
legi[3][[1]] <- legi[3][[1]] |> select(-contains("OuderRegioCode"), -contains("GrootOuderRegioCode"),-contains("LijstNummer"),-contains("VeldType"))
legi[2][[1]] <- legi[2][[1]] |> select(-contains("OuderRegioCode"), -contains("GrootOuderRegioCode"),-contains("LijstNummer"),-contains("VeldType"))
```

```{r}
colnames(legi[3][[1]]) <- c("Municipalité","Code","Liste","Votes")
colnames(legi[2][[1]]) <- c("Municipalité","Code","Liste","Votes")
legi[2][[1]]
```

```{r}
fix_nuenen2 <- function(x) {
  x <- x |> mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
  
  nuenen_rows <- x[[2]] == "Nuenen"
  x[nuenen_rows, 3:(ncol(x) - 1)] <- x[nuenen_rows, 4:ncol(x)]
  x[nuenen_rows, ncol(x)] <- NA
  
  x |> type.convert(as.is = TRUE)
}
legi[1] <- lapply(legi[1], fix_nuenen2)
```

```{r}
test <- lapply(legi[1], function(x) x %>% filter(str_detect(GemeenteNaam, "Nuenen")))
test
legi[2][[1]] <- legi[2][[1]] |> mutate(Code = as.integer(str_remove(Code, "^G0*")))
legi[3][[1]] <- legi[3][[1]] |> mutate(Code = as.integer(str_remove(Code, "^G0*")))
legi[3][[1]]
```

```{r}
legi[1][[1]] <- legi[1][[1]] |> relocate(GemeenteNaam, .before = GemeenteCode)
colnames(legi[1][[1]]) <- c("Municipalité","Code","Liste","Votes")

```

```{r}
legi <-append(legi,"DATA/PS2023_Stemmen_Per_Lijst_Per_Gemeente.csv")
legi[[4]]<-read_csv2("DATA/PS2023_Stemmen_Per_Lijst_Per_Gemeente.csv")
names(legi) <- c("2021","2023","2025","loc2023")

legi[4][[1]]
```

```{r}
legi[4][[1]] <- legi[4][[1]] |> relocate(GemeenteNaam, .before = GemeenteCode)
colnames(legi[4][[1]]) <- c("Municipalité","Code","Liste","Votes")
legi[3]
```

```{r}
t2025 <- legi[3][[1]] |>
  group_by(Municipalité) |>
  mutate(Votes = Votes / sum(Votes)) |>
  ungroup()


t2023 <- legi[2][[1]] |>
  group_by(Municipalité) |>
  mutate(Votes = Votes / sum(Votes)) |>
  ungroup()


```

```{r}


pca_data2025 <- t2025 |>
  filter(str_detect(Liste, "VVD|GROENLINKS|PVV|BBB|D66")) |>
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = Municipalité,
    names_from = Liste,
    values_from = Votes
  )


pca_result <- pca_data |>
  select(-Municipalité) |>
  prcomp(scale. = TRUE)


summary(pca_result)


autoplot(pca_result, data = pca_data, loadings = TRUE, loadings.label = TRUE)
summary(pca_result)
```

```{r}
pca_data <- t2023 |>
  filter(str_detect(Liste, "VVD|GROENLINKS|PVV|BBB|D66")) |>
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = Municipalité,
    names_from = Liste,
    values_from = Votes
  )


pca_result <- pca_data |>
  select(-Municipalité) |>
  prcomp(scale. = TRUE)


summary(pca_result)


autoplot(pca_result, data = pca_data, loadings = TRUE, loadings.label = TRUE)
summary(pca_result)
```

```{r}
r2023 <- legi[4][[1]] |>
  group_by(Municipalité) |>
  mutate(Votes = 100*Votes / sum(Votes)) |>
  ungroup()

```

```{r}
r2023
```

```{r}
r2023bis <- r2023 |>
  mutate(Liste = case_when(
    str_detect(Liste, "GROENLINKS|Partij van de Arbeid (P.v.d.A.)") ~ "Partij van de Arbeid (P.v.d.A.) / GROENLINKS",
    TRUE ~ Liste
  )) |>
  group_by(Municipalité, Liste) |>
  summarise(Votes = sum(Votes), .groups = "drop")




pca_data <- r2023bis |>
  filter(str_detect(Liste, "GROENLINKS|VVD|PVV|BBB")) |>
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = Municipalité,
    names_from = Liste,
    values_from = Votes
  )


pca_result <- pca_data |>
  select(-Municipalité) |>
  prcomp(scale. = TRUE)


summary(pca_result)


autoplot(pca_result, data = pca_data, loadings = TRUE, loadings.label = TRUE)
summary(pca_result)
```

```{r}


gemeenten <- st_read("https://service.pdok.nl/cbs/gebiedsindelingen/2025/wfs/v1_0?request=GetFeature&service=WFS&version=2.0.0&typeName=gemeente_gegeneraliseerd&outputFormat=application/json")
gemeenten <- gemeenten |> mutate(statcode = as.integer(str_remove(statcode, "^GM0*")))




```

```{r}

vote_vvd_2025 <- t2025 |>
  filter(str_detect(Liste, "VVD")) |>
  dplyr::select(Code,Municipalité,Votes
  )



```

```{r}
map_vvd_2025 <- gemeenten |>
  left_join(vote_vvd_2025, by = c("statcode" = "Code"))
```

```{r}
ggplot(map_vvd_2025) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = Votes), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(labels = scales::percent) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "Vote VVD par municipalité", fill = "Pourcentage")
```

```{r}

plot_party <- function(party_pattern, party_label) {
  vote_data <- t2025 |>
    filter(str_detect(Liste, party_pattern)) |>
    dplyr::select(Code, Municipalité, Votes)
  
  map_data <- gemeenten |>
    left_join(vote_data, by = c("statcode" = "Code"))
  
  ggplot(map_data) +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = Votes), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(labels = scales::percent) +
    theme_void() +
    labs(title = paste("Vote", party_label, "par municipalité"), fill = "Pourcentage")
}


parties <- c("VVD" = "VVD", "PVV" = "PVV", "D66" = "D66", "GL-PvdA" = "GROENLINKS","SGP"="SGP")


plots <- imap(parties, ~plot_party(.x, .y))


library(patchwork)
wrap_plots(plots)


plots$"PVV"





```

```{r}



# 1. Build wide vote share matrices per election, one row per municipality
# Make sure municipalities are aligned — join on Code



party_patterns <- c("VVD", "PVV", "D66", "GROENLINKS", "CDA", "JA21", "SGP",
                    "SP", "PvdD", "FvD", "BBB", "CU", "Volt", "DENK")

filter_parties <- function(df, patterns) {
  df |>
    filter(Reduce(`|`, lapply(patterns, function(p) str_detect(Liste, p)))) |>
    mutate(Liste = case_when(
      str_detect(Liste, "VVD") ~ "VVD",
    str_detect(Liste, "PVV") ~ "PVV",
    str_detect(Liste, "D66") ~ "D66",
    str_detect(Liste, "GROENLINKS") ~ "GL-PvdA",
    str_detect(Liste, "CDA") ~ "CDA",
    str_detect(Liste, "JA21") ~ "JA21",
    str_detect(Liste, "SGP") ~ "SGP",
    str_detect(Liste, "SP") ~ "SP",
    str_detect(Liste, "Partij voor de Dieren") ~ "PvdD",
    str_detect(Liste, "Forum") ~ "FvD",
    str_detect(Liste, "BBB") ~ "BBB",
    str_detect(Liste, "ChristenUnie") ~ "CU",
    str_detect(Liste, "Volt") ~ "Volt",
    str_detect(Liste, "DENK") ~ "DENK"
    ))
}

X_tmp <- t2023 |>
  filter_parties(party_patterns) |>
  pivot_wider(id_cols = Code, names_from = Liste, values_from = Votes) |>
  column_to_rownames("Code") |>
  as.matrix()

Y_tmp <- t2025 |>
  filter_parties(party_patterns) |>
  pivot_wider(id_cols = Code, names_from = Liste, values_from = Votes) |>
  column_to_rownames("Code") |>
  as.matrix()


common_codes <- intersect(rownames(X_tmp), rownames(Y_tmp))
common_parties <- intersect(colnames(X_tmp), colnames(Y_tmp))

X <- X_tmp[common_codes, common_parties]
Y <- Y_tmp[common_codes, common_parties]

X[is.na(X)] <- 0
Y[is.na(Y)] <- 0

result <- cc(X, Y)



# 4. Run CCA
result <- cc(X, Y)

# 5. Inspect correlations between canonical variates
result$cor

# 6. Plot
plt.cc(result, type = "v",var.label = TRUE)
```

```{r}

# Check the canonical correlations first
result$cor

# Check the canonical correlations first
result$cor

# See which parties load on each dimension
result$xcoef  # 2023 loadings
result$ycoef  # 2025 loadings
```

```{r}
# Check the canonical correlations first
result$cor

# See which parties load on each dimension
result$xcoef  # 2023 loadings
result$ycoef  # 2025 loadings
```

```{r}
# Labelled plot
plt.cc(result, type = "v", var.label = TRUE)

# Check how much variance each canonical variate explains
result$cor^2
```

```{r}

result$cor^2

```

```{r}
# 1. Direct party-by-party correlation between elections
cor_matrix <- cor(X, Y)
print(cor_matrix)

# How strongly does each party's 2023 geography predict its 2025 geography?
diag(cor_matrix)

# 2. Or just scatter plots per party
par(mfrow = c(3, 4))
for (party in colnames(X)) {
  if (party %in% colnames(Y)) {
    plot(X[, party], Y[, party],
         xlab = paste(party, "2023"),
         ylab = paste(party, "2025"),
         main = party)
    abline(lm(Y[, party] ~ X[, party]), col = "red")
  }
}
```

```{r}
common_parties <- intersect(colnames(X), colnames(Y))
diag(cor(X[, common_parties], Y[, common_parties]))
```

```{r}
result$cor^2
diag(cor(X, Y))
```

```{r}
fviz_nbclust(X, kmeans, method = "wss")
```

```{r}




# 2. Run k-means (replace k with your chosen number)
set.seed(42)
km2023 <- kmeans(X, centers = 5, nstart = 25)

# 3. Visualise clusters on PCA plot
fviz_cluster(km, data = X, ellipse.type = "norm") +
  theme_void()

# 4. Add cluster membership to a dataframe for mapping
cluster_df <- data.frame(
  Code = rownames(X),
  cluster = km2023$cluster
)

# 5. Map the clusters
map_data <- gemeenten |>
  mutate(statcode = as.character(statcode)) |>
  left_join(cluster_df, by = c("statcode" = "Code"))

ggplot(map_data) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = factor(cluster)), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "Clusters municipaux, législatives 2023", fill = "Cluster")
```

```{r}


set.seed(42)
km2025 <- kmeans(Y, centers = 5, nstart = 25)

# 3. Visualise clusters on PCA plot
fviz_cluster(km, data = Y, ellipse.type = "norm") +
  theme_void()

km2025$cluster <- dplyr::recode(km2025$cluster,
  `2` = 4L,
  `4` = 5L,
  `5` = 2L
)





# 4. Add cluster membership to a dataframe for mapping
cluster_df <- data.frame(
  Code = rownames(Y),
  cluster = km2025$cluster
)






# 5. Map the clusters
map_data <- gemeenten |>
  mutate(statcode = as.character(statcode)) |>
  left_join(cluster_df, by = c("statcode" = "Code"))

ggplot(map_data) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = factor(cluster)), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "Clusters municipaux, législatives 2025", fill = "Cluster")

```

```{r}
# Run k-means on both
set.seed(42)
km5_2023 <- kmeans(X, centers = 5, nstart = 25)
set.seed(42)
km5_2025 <- kmeans(Y, centers = 5, nstart = 25)
km5_2025$cluster <- dplyr::recode(km5_2025$cluster,
  `2` = 4L,
  `4` = 5L,
  `5` = 2L
)





# Compare cluster centers
km5_2023$centers
km5_2025$centers

# See how municipalities moved between clusters
table(km5_2023$cluster, km5_2025$cluster)
```

```{r}
cluster_df <- data.frame(
  Code = rownames(X),
  cluster_2023 = km5_2023$cluster,
  cluster_2025 = km5_2025$cluster
) |>
  mutate(switched = cluster_2023 != cluster_2025)

# Which municipalities switched?
cluster_df |> filter(switched) |> arrange(cluster_2023, cluster_2025)
```

```{r}
cluster_df <- data.frame(
  Code = rownames(X),
  cluster_2023 = km5_2023$cluster,
  cluster_2025 = km5_2025$cluster
) |>
  mutate(switched = cluster_2023 != cluster_2025)

```

```{r}
cluster_df |>
  filter(switched) |>
  mutate(Code = as.integer(Code)) |>
  left_join(
    gemeenten |> st_drop_geometry() |> dplyr::select(statcode, statnaam),
    by = c("Code" = "statcode")
  ) |>
  arrange(cluster_2023, cluster_2025)
```

```{r}

gemeenten2 <- st_read("https://service.pdok.nl/cbs/wijkenbuurten/2023/wfs/v1_0?service=WFS&version=2.0.0&request=GetFeature&typeName=wijkenbuurten:gemeenten&outputFormat=application/json")

```

```{r}
names(gemeenten2)

```
